summary: Add a matching check in validate_streaming_constraints to raise a 422 for word_timestamps=true with any streaming request.
Move stream_format='audio' assignment after _update_payload_common to prevent it from being overwritten.
Add a comment above is_sse_stream() explaining the intentional short-circuit that prevents stream=True from overriding an explicit stream_format='audio'.
Replace the 'If omitted, stream=true selects SSE' phrase with 'When stream=true, the default is sse; use stream_format='audio' to override.' to eliminate ambiguity.
Verify that all other e2e tests sending stream=true without stream_format now explicitly opt in to raw audio.
Confirm that no raw-audio test uses a direct httpx call without updating the payload to include stream_format.
